qa_pairs.question: What type of event occurred for Cedar on November 7-8, 2024?
qa_pairs.answer: An outage occurred for Cedar from November 7 to November 8, 2024.

qa_pairs.question: When did the Cedar outage take place?
qa_pairs.answer: The Cedar outage occurred from November 7, 2024, at 6 a.m. PST until November 8, 2024, at 6 a.m. PST.

qa_pairs.question: Which components of the Cedar system were unavailable during the November 2024 outage?
qa_pairs.answer: The Cedar compute nodes were unavailable during the outage from November 7 to November 8, 2024.

qa_pairs.question: Which Cedar services remained operational during the November 7-8, 2024, outage?
qa_pairs.answer: Cedar login nodes, storage, and cloud services remained operational and unaffected during the outage.

qa_pairs.question: What was the status of the Cedar outage that started on November 7, 2024?
qa_pairs.answer: The Cedar outage, which started on November 7, 2024, was complete.

qa_pairs.question: What time zone applies to the start and end times of the Cedar outage on November 7-8, 2024?
qa_pairs.answer: The start and end times for the Cedar outage on November 7-8, 2024, are in Pacific Standard Time (PST).

qa_pairs.question: What was the duration of the Cedar outage in November 2024?
qa_pairs.answer: The Cedar outage from November 7, 2024, to November 8, 2024, lasted for one day.
